description: SMS Performance Monitor — tracks safety performance indicators (SPIs) and safety objectives against targets, monitors SMS health and management review compliance

hard_stops.label: SPI Critical Threshold Breached
hard_stops.logic: Safety performance indicator exceeds critical limit — immediate management attention required per 14 CFR 5.71

hard_stops.label: Management Review Overdue
hard_stops.logic: SMS management review is overdue per the operator's SMS manual schedule — regulatory compliance risk

soft_flags.label: SPI Trending Toward Threshold
soft_flags.logic: Safety performance indicator is trending toward its critical threshold — proactive intervention recommended

soft_flags.label: Audit Finding Unresolved >90 Days
soft_flags.logic: Internal or external audit finding has been open for more than 90 days without resolution

soft_flags.label: Safety Objective Not Met
soft_flags.logic: A defined safety objective was not met within its target period

soft_flags.label: Improvement Action Overdue
soft_flags.logic: A continuous improvement action from the management review is past its due date
